headlines.description: — Jalen Green scored 29 points in his Phoenix debut, Devin Booker added 24 points and the Suns beat the short-handed Los Angeles Clippers 115-102 on Thursday night.
headlines.shortLinkText: Green shines in Suns debut with 29 points, and Phoenix tops undermanned Clippers 115-102
